message:
fix(beads): add version checking and fix test infrastructure

- Add BeadsVersion struct for semver parsing
- Add check_compatibility() for client version validation
- Remove unnecessary #[allow(unsafe_code)] from integration_tests
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for unused test fixture field
- Add extra field handling for forward compatibility

Code review findings addressed:
- wal_safety_tests fresh_client now uses env.client()
- concurrent_tests log field properly annotated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
